mood: Cinematic, moody, energetic, premium, bold, industrial studio console

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tighter uppercase

spacing_and_layout.cards: rounded-none border border-white/10 bg-[#0F0F0F] p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden
spacing_and_layout.padding_generous: Use p-8 to p-12 inside bordered containers to avoid text collision

hero.layout: min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-end pb-24 px-6 md:px-12 relative
hero.background: Dark overlay (bg-black/60 to bg-black/30) over the studio gallery image. Heavy noise texture overlay. Ensure image isn't lost in darkness.
hero.typography: Massive H1 left-aligned, max-w-4xl. Overline in primary color.
hero.ctas: Primary button flat with sharp edges. Secondary button outline with glass effect.

marquee.style: Kinetic Texture. Massive outline text (text-6xl) 'MIX • MASTER • BEAT • COACHING' running slowly in background with opacity-5. Use react-fast-marquee.

stats_badges.style: Floating glass capsules in hero. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 px-4 py-2 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-mono.

process_bento.style: Mode B: Control Room Grid. 4 steps. Sharp edges, 1px solid border-border. Large mono numbers (01, 02) in the corner with opacity-20.

pricing.style: The 'Tracing Beam' or subtle glassmorphism for normal tiers. The 'Mest Værdi' tier gets a persistent primary border and a slight y-offset (-translate-y-4 on lg). Use Shadcn button for booking.

gallery.style: Mode A: Tetris Grid. Asymmetric mix of landscape and portrait studio shots. Hover scale 1.05 with image brightness transition from 0.8 to 1.

player_spotify.style: Embed integrated into a dark card with glowing ambient shadow behind it, so it doesn't look like a standard iframe drop-in.

artists_youtube.style: Bento layout of youtube thumbnails with play button overlay.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white uppercase font-mono text-sm tracking-wider px-8 py-4 hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors rounded-none inline-flex items-center justify-center
buttons.outline: border border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 text-white uppercase font-mono text-sm tracking-wider px-8 py-4 transition-colors rounded-none inline-flex items-center justify-center

motion_and_effects.hover_states: Buttons and links must explicitly shift text or border colors. Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and borders illuminate to white/30.
motion_and_effects.scroll_reveal: Staggered fade-up for bento grid items using Framer Motion.
motion_and_effects.textures: Global fixed div with pointer-events-none holding a subtle noise/grain SVG (opacity 3% to 5%) to kill the flat digital look.
motion_and_effects.scrolling: MANDATORY: Use lenis library for premium momentum smooth scrolling.

hero_bg.description: Main hero background, requires bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text contrast.

content_danish.hero_sub: Oplev din musik stige til nye højder i DK's bedste studie. BLOWUP studio tilbyder professionel hjælp til mix, master, beats og tekster.

process_steps.title: 1. Retning
process_steps.desc: Vi finder vibe, reference og mål, så sessionen starter med en klar plan.

process_steps.title: 2. Optagelse
process_steps.desc: Patrick coacher flow, energi og delivery, mens takes bliver bygget hurtigt op.

process_steps.title: 3. Sound
process_steps.desc: Beat, vokalchain, mix og master formes omkring artisten, ikke omvendt.

process_steps.title: 4. Release
process_steps.desc: Du går derfra med en sang, der føles tættere på færdig end bare en demo.

reviews.name: Pelle Krusbæk
reviews.text: Varmeste producer i Danmark. Gratis øl.

reviews.name: Willow
reviews.text: Meget seriøst og produktivt arbejde, rigtig god og talentfuld producer der ved hvad han laver.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid matching role-based kebab-case (e.g. data-testid='book-session-hero-btn')
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text must pass APCA contrast on top of #050505 background. Overlaid text on images requires text-shadow or gradient scrim.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion. DO NOT use generic fonts like Inter for headings. Apply Clash Display or Cabinet Grotesk. Implement a global noise overlay (SVG filter). Do NOT center-align the hero; use strong asymmetrical layout. Ensure dark mode is hardcoded (no light mode toggle). Embed the Spotify playlist iframe in the 'Udgivelser' section. Build a dynamic Bento grid for the gallery and process steps. All text must be in Danish as provided. MUST use lenis for smooth scrolling.
